failedAssertions.reason: Toast notification did NOT appear when API error occurred. The notification region (role='region' with aria-label 'Notifications') remained empty after the error. However, the previous album state was correctly preserved - the album remained visible after the failed reroll request.

frictions.description: Catalog refresh running in background caused 500 errors during testing. These errors appear to be from a separate catalog status polling mechanism and are unrelated to the core functionality being tested.
frictions.resolution: Allowed refresh to complete before testing, verified reroll worked successfully despite background errors
